description: Phase-cost recording fixture (REQ-hooks-001): an active change resolves via a dedicated openspec-bearing workspace (subagent-stop-phase-cost-workspace/openspec/changes/demo). The stdin carries no valid json:result-envelope fence, so persistResultEnvelope no-ops and the tracked state.yaml stays byte-for-byte pristine, while persistPhaseCost exercises its active-change write path (writing into the gitignored .ospec/session/demo/phase-costs.jsonl). Only stdout is asserted here; the JSONL content is a disposable session artifact proven by unit tests, not by this fixture.
